evals.prompt: Release a new patch version of prism-plugin. The current version is 2.5.0.
evals.expected_output: Follows the full 9-step release pipeline: asks bump type, bumps version to 2.5.1, builds all artifacts (CLI, VSIX, Electron, Tauri, NSIS), commits, tags, pushes, creates GitHub release with 8 assets, creates eval snapshot, generates eval cases, and reports results.
expectations: Asks the user which semver component to bump before proceeding
Reads VERSION file and shows current version
Runs bump-version.py with the chosen bump type
Manually checks Cargo.toml and tauri.conf.json for version updates
Builds all 5 artifact types (CLI, VSIX, NSIS resources, Electron, Tauri)
Creates git commit and tag with the new version
Creates GitHub release with 8 assets listed
Reports a summary with release URL at the end

evals.prompt: Release a new minor version. The current version is 2.5.0. I want a minor bump.
evals.expected_output: After building and pushing, creates an eval snapshot at .prism/shared/evals/v2.6.0-snapshot/ by copying skills/, agents/, commands/, and scripts/. Then generates evals.json files for each skill.
expectations: Copies skills/, agents/, commands/, and scripts/ into the snapshot directory
Verifies the snapshot by listing contents and counting items
Finds the previous snapshot to use as baseline for diffing
Generates evals.json files for each skill under .prism/shared/evals/v2.6.0/skills/<name>/
Adds eval files to the release commit with git add and amend

evals.prompt: Release a patch version. The gh CLI is not authenticated.
evals.expected_output: Completes all build steps but when gh release create fails, tells the user to run gh auth login rather than proceeding or force-pushing.
expectations: Completes version bump and all build steps before encountering the error
Does NOT force-push or skip the GitHub release step
Tells the user to run 'gh auth login' when gh fails
Does NOT attempt workarounds that bypass authentication
